summary: Account enhancements, expanded project categories, and UI polish.

new: Contact information is now available on project pages
New project categories with color-coded badges
fixes: Cookie visuals updated for consistent display

technical_changes: Dropdown logic refactored into reusable helpers
database_changes: Contact info fields now saved with projects

summary: AI enhancements, creator profiles, and project discovery upgrades.

new: AI insights section on project pages
Project cards now show creation date and views
Creator profiles added to each project page
fixes: Cleaner mobile layout for project cards

database_changes: Creator metadata stored with project records
api_updates: AI endpoint reports usage stats via GET

summary: Cookie consent upgrades, moderation workflows, and dashboard safety improvements.

new: Moderation status now visible on dashboard
improvements: Deletion confirmations are clearer and safer
AI button states feel more responsive

technical_changes: New moderation API endpoint with rule checks
database_changes: Moderation fields now update publish state
internal_improvements: Cookie assets migrated to new CSS/JS

summary: AI Assist for writing, stronger permissions, and styling upgrades.

new: AI Assist added to help write project descriptions
Copy Page Link button in dashboard
improvements: Project cards show cleaner text hierarchy

technical_changes: AI Assist uses Gemini via serverless API
Project queries now use owner_user_id checks
database_changes: AI usage tables and RPC functions added
internal_improvements: Switched more pages to unminified CSS for debugging

summary: Major platform graduation with full Supabase integration and UI polish.

new: Full account and project management experience
Live project hub with public browsing
improvements: Core UI polished for consistent navigation

technical_changes: Supabase auth and database integration across pages
database_changes: Projects and account profiles persisted in Supabase

major_details.title: v2.0.0 — Graduation Release
major_details.why_it_matters: This release moved NexCore from beta to a full platform with live projects, accounts, and management tools.
major_details.description: Teams now get complete visibility over their project pages, while the hub makes discovery fast.

summary: Initial release of the NexCore Labs platform.
